summary: Executed backend API regression tests (8 pytest cases) and frontend Playwright flow tests across all requested routes and integrations. Core flows are working end-to-end on public URL.

issues: Submit button text contrast is low against the button background and may reduce readability/accessibility.

action_items: Improve contact form submit button foreground/background contrast for accessibility compliance.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical backend/frontend logic defects found in the reviewed files for requested scope.
API contract alignment between frontend and backend is consistent for all tested endpoints.
Shop/Office address/phone values are still placeholders; content update is needed before production launch.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST contact inquiry records via POST /api/contact-us during automated testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite now exists at /app/backend/tests/test_public_api.py and uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from environment. One transient timing issue observed in UI test before adding wait-for-data step; final run passed fully.
rca of the issue: No functional product bug found. Initial Playwright failure was test-timing related: row/card counts were asserted before async API data finished loading. Mitigated by explicit waits for data-testid card/row selectors before assertions.
